name: @opencause/desktop

scripts.package:win:unsigned: npm run prepackage:win:unsigned && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win --x64 && node scripts/release-smoke-check.mjs
scripts.package:dir: npm run prepackage:dir && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --dir && node scripts/release-smoke-check.mjs
scripts.prepackage:win:unsigned: npm run build -w @opencause/shared && npm run build -w @opencause/worker
scripts.prepackage:dir: npm run build -w @opencause/shared && npm run build -w @opencause/worker

description: Desktop volunteer worker shell for OpenCause Compute
author: AppAssist
